name: d2d_unsupported_opcode
description: An opcode outside the sacred bank (`0xD0..0xFF` and the documented core opcodes) MUST be ignored on the D2D path: no receipt state advances, no anchor mutates, audit log records a single DROP entry. This vector pins drop/no-op semantics.
anti_claim: If an unsupported opcode advances the multi-tile receipt counter, mutates the Blake3 anchor, or toggles `layer_frozen`, the implementation violates TN-D2D-06.
